---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or links to similar implementations that may be helpful.
